def positive_plugin_discovery_scans_filesystem_each_invocation():
    rule_id = "plugin_discovery_scans_filesystem_each_invocation"
    family = "packaging"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag plugin or extension discovery that rescans disk on every invocation."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
